message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Initial request: "analize deeper to be able to offer the most creative, innovative and inteligent sollution" for the CortexBuild Ultimate codebase
   - Implement both Dashboard "Site Command Center" AND Safety "HSE Intelligence Hub" redesigns simultaneously
   - Transform CortexBuild from record-keeping software to decision intelligence platform with industrial command center aesthetic
   - "continue - see and review to approval all our changes, branches and files"
   - "push and save" - commit and push all changes to remote
   - "push, commit, sync and merge all" - integrate all branches, delete irrelevant files
   - "save, fix any conflicts, errors or any issues. make sure we have everything successfully build and implemented. save, push, commit, merge, sync, delete tem after merger keeping the most advanced one. implement all changes and review them to successfully integrate"

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - React + TypeScript component architecture
   - Express.js backend migration from Supabase
   - JWT token-based authentication (bcrypt, jsonwebtoken)
   - PostgreSQL database with pg connection pooling
   - Recharts library for data visualization (AreaChart, BarChart, PieChart, RadarChart, LineChart)
   - CSS Variable design token system (--slate-*, --amber-*, --emerald-*, --red-*)
   - Custom font stack (Syne for display, DM Sans for body, JetBrains Mono for mono)
   - Inline style pattern for dynamic theming
   - useMemo for performance optimization
   - TypeScript strict mode with AnyRow pattern (Record<string, unknown>)
   - Lucide React icons with ComponentType pattern
   - CORS middleware for cross-origin requests
   - Multer for file uploads
   - Vite 8 build tool
   - Tailwind CSS integration

3. Files and Code Sections:

   **Dashboard.tsx** (src/components/modules/Dashboard.tsx)
   - Purpose: Transform dashboard into "Site Command Center" with industrial intelligence aesthetic
   - Key changes:
     - Added 20+ new icon imports (Cloud, CloudRain, Wind, Thermometer, Radar, etc.)
     - SITE_WEATHER constant for weather mock data
     - buildHealthData() function computing 6 health dimensions (Progress, Budget, Safety, RFIs, Cash Flow, Compliance)
     - Enhanced StatCard component with sparkline trends
     - WeatherWidget component showing temperature, conditions, wind, humidity
     - AlertCarousel component for rotating critical alerts
     - ResourceHeatmap component showing workforce distribution by trade
     - Portfolio health radar chart
     - Revenue trend area chart with gradient fills
     - Activity feed component
     - Quick action buttons
   - Critical fixes applied:
     - Icon type: `React.ComponentType<{ className?: string; size?: number; strokeWidth?: number }>`
     - chartData wrapped in useMemo: `useMemo(() => buildChartData(invoices), [invoices])`
     - Date parsing with year comparison: `m.year === d.getFullYear()`
     - Hover handlers replaced with CSS classes (hover-project, hover-safety, hover-action)

   **Safety.tsx** (src/components/modules/Safety.tsx)
   - Purpose: Transform Safety into "HSE Intelligence Hub" with risk analytics
   - Key implementations:
     - severityConfig with 4 levels (low, medium, high, critical)
     - statusConfig for incident tracking
     - typeConfig for incident classification
     - buildTrendData() - 7-month trend data from incidents
     - buildRiskHeatmap() - project risk distribution by severity
     - buildRootCauseData() - incidents by root cause
     - buildForecastData() - 3-month risk projection
     - safetyScore computation (100 - open×8 - critical×15)
     - KPI Grid (5 metrics: Total, Open, Critical, RIDDOR, Closed)
     - Trend area chart with gradient fills
     - Risk heatmap bar chart by project
     - Root cause pie chart
     - Risk forecast line chart
     - Category sub-navigation tabs
     - Incident list with expandable cards
     - Modal form for incident reporting with RIDDOR checkbox
   - Critical fixes applied:
     - RIDDOR checkbox dynamic ID: `id={`riddor-${editId ?? 'new'}`}`
     - Hover handlers replaced with CSS classes (hover-card, hover-btn, hover-tab, hover-danger)

   **index.css** (src/index.css)
   - Purpose: Design token system
   - Added hover utility classes:
     - .hover-card, .hover-btn, .hover-tab, .hover-action, .hover-project, .hover-safety, .hover-danger
   - CSS variable design tokens for colors, fonts, motion

   **server/ directory** (NEW - Express backend)
   - server/index.js - Express app setup with CORS, auth middleware, routes
   - server/db.js - PostgreSQL connection pooling
   - server/middleware/auth.js - JWT verification middleware
   - server/routes/auth.js - Login, register endpoints
   - server/routes/generic.js - Dynamic CRUD router for all tables
   - server/routes/ai.js - AI assistant endpoints
   - server/routes/upload.js - File upload with multer
   - server/scripts/setup.sql - Database schema
   - server/scripts/seed.sql - Sample data
   - server/.env.example - Environment configuration

   **AuthContext.tsx** (src/context/AuthContext.tsx)
   - Migrated from Supabase auth to token-based JWT auth
   - Removed Supabase imports, changed to Profile type
   - Uses getToken, setToken, getStoredUser pattern

   **supabase.ts** (src/lib/supabase.ts)
   - Rewritten from Supabase client to auth helpers
   - Provides getToken, setToken, clearToken, getStoredUser, setStoredUser, API_BASE

   **api.ts** (src/services/api.ts)
   - Changed from Supabase client calls to Express API endpoints
   - Updated comments to reference "local Express.js backend"

   **LoginPage.tsx** (src/components/auth/LoginPage.tsx)
   - Removed Supabase import
   - Converted to inline styles with CSS variables
   - Updated branding to "CORTEXBUILD LTD"

   **Header.tsx & Sidebar.tsx** (src/components/layout/)
   - Converted from Tailwind classes to inline styles using CSS variables
   - Badge color system standardized (amber/blue/green variants)

   **All 18 module files** (AIAssistant.tsx, CIS.tsx, ChangeOrders.tsx, Documents.tsx, Drawings.tsx, FieldView.tsx, Inspections.tsx, PlantEquipment.tsx, PunchList.tsx, RAMS.tsx, RFIs.tsx, RiskRegister.tsx, SiteOperations.tsx, Subcontractors.tsx, Teams.tsx, Tenders.tsx, Timesheets.tsx)
   - Status colour maps changed to dark theme (bg-green-900/50, bg-amber-500/20)
   - Heading sizes increased (text-2xl → text-3xl)
   - Text colors changed to dark theme (text-white/text-gray-400)
   - Removed unused Lucide imports
   - Field name normalization (camelCase/snake_case handling)

   **README.md** (NEW)
   - Comprehensive documentation with setup instructions, architecture overview, module list, API endpoints

   **.env.example**
   - Updated from Supabase variables to Express backend: `VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001`

4. Errors and fixes:

   **Dashboard.tsx TypeScript errors (multiple)**:
   - Duplicate 'Radar' identifier: Fixed by renaming import to 'Radar as RadarIcon'
   - Invalid Recharts 'axis' prop: Fixed by using 'stroke="transparent"' instead
   - Missing imports ClipboardList, ShoppingCart: Added to imports
   - Type issues with AnyRow unknown data: Fixed by extracting values with String() and Number()
   - Module type string incompatibility: Fixed with 'as Module' type assertions

   **Safety.tsx truncation errors**:
   - File kept getting truncated mid-write due to size limits
   - Fixed by: Deleted file with `rm` and recreated fresh with complete content

   **Code Review Critical Issues (5 issues)**:
   1. TypeScript Icon type: Changed from `React.FC<{className?: string}>` with `as any` to `React.ComponentType<{ className?: string; size?: number; strokeWidth?: number }>`
   2. Memory leak: Wrapped chartData in `useMemo(() => buildChartData(invoices), [invoices])`
   3. Date parsing bug: Added year comparison in buildChartData: `m.year === d.getFullYear()`
   4. RIDDOR checkbox accessibility: Changed to dynamic ID `id={`riddor-${editId ?? 'new'}`}`
   5. Inline style hover handlers: Replaced with CSS classes (hover-card, hover-btn, hover-tab, hover-project, hover-safety, hover-action, hover-danger)

   **Duplicate className attribute**:
   - Error: "JSX elements cannot have multiple attributes with the same name"
   - Fixed by combining: `className="card-hover hover-project"` instead of two separate className props

   **Git push authentication failure**:
   - Error: "could not read Username for 'https://github.com': No such device or address"
   - Fixed by: Configured git credential helper with `git config --global credential.helper "!gh auth git-credential"`
   - Completed GitHub device flow authentication (code: A9FD-01DD)

   **Build artifact cleanup**:
   - Removed obsolete files: supabase/, app/, tsbuildinfo, vite.config.ts.timestamp-*.mjs

5. Problem Solving:
   - Identified dual-mode UI pattern inconsistency (inline styles vs Tailwind classes across modules)
   - Designed health scoring algorithm combining 6 project dimensions
   - Created weather widget pattern for construction site context
   - Implemented alert carousel for rotating critical notifications
   - Designed resource heatmap showing workforce distribution by trade
   - Created radar chart visualization for portfolio health
   - Built risk heatmap aggregation by project and severity
   - Implemented root cause distribution pie chart
   - Created predictive risk forecast algorithm
   - Resolved TypeScript strict type checking for dynamic data
   - Migrated entire authentication system from Supabase to Express+JWT
   - Created Express backend with CRUD endpoints for all 20+ database tables
   - Consolidated all work onto single main branch with no other branches
   - Removed all obsolete files and build artifacts
   - Pushed all changes to remote repository successfully

6. All user messages:
   - "analize deeper to be able to offer the most creative, innovative and inteligent sollution" - requested comprehensive deep analysis for frontend design opportunities
   - "do both" - implement both the Dashboard "Site Command Center" redesign AND the Safety "HSE Intelligence Hub" redesign simultaneously
   - "continue - see and review to approval all our changes, branches and files. use agents, skills, tools and pkugins to enhance your productivity."
   - "push and save"
   - "push, commit, sync and merge all"
   - "continue"
   - "save, fix any conflicts, errors or any issues. make sure we have everything successfully build and inplemented. save, push, commit, merge, sync, delete tem after merger keeping the most advanced one. implement all changes and review them to successfully integrate"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - None. All tasks completed successfully.

8. Current Work:
   Immediately before this summary request, the work was completed with final verification:
   - `npm run build` - Production build succeeds with no errors
   - `git status` - Working tree clean, branch synced with origin/main
   - `server npm install` - Server dependencies installed
   - `tsc --noEmit` - TypeScript type check passes
   - `node -c server/index.js` - Server JavaScript syntax valid
   - `curl localhost:3001/api/health` - Server health endpoint returns `{"status":"ok","version":"1.0.0"}`
   - `git log --oneline --all -10` - Shows 10 commits on main branch
   - `git diff HEAD~5 --stat` - Shows 52 files changed: +8589 insertions, -4085 deletions

   Final repository state:
   - Single branch: main (local + remote synced)
   - 5 new commits pushed:
     - d8f4848: docs: add README with setup instructions
     - 2318f00: chore: update .env.example for Express backend
     - 8733d09: chore: remove obsolete files and build artifacts
     - c89b3ec: feat: full platform redesign — dark theme + Express backend migration
     - 1c7d95d: fix: critical issues in Dashboard and Safety redesigns
   - All changes successfully integrated, built, tested, committed, and pushed to remote

9. Optional Next Step:
   No next step required. All user requests have been completed:
   - Dashboard and Safety redesigns implemented with critical issues fixed
   - All 18 modules updated with dark theme styling
   - Express backend created and integrated
   - Authentication migrated from Supabase to JWT
   - All branches merged into single main branch
   - Obsolete files deleted (supabase/, app/, build artifacts)
   - All changes committed, pushed, and synced to remote
   - Production build verified successful
   - Server health endpoint verified working

-- CortexBuild Ultimate — Database Setup
-- Run: psql -U cortexbuild -d cortexbuild -f setup.sql

CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pgcrypto";

-- Users
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name          TEXT NOT NULL,
  email         TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  role          TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'project_manager'
                  CHECK (role IN ('super_admin','company_owner','admin','project_manager','field_worker','client')),
  company       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CortexBuild Ltd',
  phone         TEXT,
  avatar        TEXT,
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Projects
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
  id             UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name           TEXT NOT NULL,
  client         TEXT NOT NULL,
  status         TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'planning'
                   CHECK (status IN ('planning','active','on_hold','completed','archived')),
  progress       INT  DEFAULT 0 CHECK (progress BETWEEN 0 AND 100),
  budget         NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  spent          NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  start_date     DATE,
  end_date       DATE,
  manager        TEXT,
  location       TEXT,
  type           TEXT,
  phase          TEXT,
  workers        INT DEFAULT 0,
  contract_value NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  description    TEXT,
  created_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Invoices
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoices (
  id             UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  number         TEXT NOT NULL,
  client         TEXT NOT NULL,
  project_id     UUID REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  project        TEXT,
  amount         NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  vat            NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  cis_deduction  NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  status         TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                   CHECK (status IN ('draft','sent','paid','overdue','disputed')),
  issue_date     DATE,
  due_date       DATE,
  description    TEXT,
  created_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Safety Incidents
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS safety_incidents (
  id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  type                TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'incident'
                        CHECK (type IN ('incident','near-miss','hazard','inspection','toolbox-talk','mewp-check')),
  title               TEXT NOT NULL,
  severity            TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'minor'
                        CHECK (severity IN ('minor','moderate','serious','fatal')),
  status              TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open'
                        CHECK (status IN ('open','investigating','resolved','closed')),
  project_id          UUID,
  project             TEXT,
  reported_by         TEXT,
  reported_by_name    TEXT,
  date                DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
  location            TEXT,
  description         TEXT,
  root_cause          TEXT,
  corrective_actions  TEXT[],
  injured_party       TEXT,
  immediate_actions   TEXT,
  created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- RFIs
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rfis (
  id             UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  number         TEXT NOT NULL,
  project_id     UUID,
  project        TEXT,
  subject        TEXT NOT NULL,
  question       TEXT,
  priority       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium'
                   CHECK (priority IN ('low','medium','high','critical')),
  status         TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open'
                   CHECK (status IN ('open','answered','closed','pending')),
  submitted_by   TEXT,
  submitted_date DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
  due_date       DATE,
  assigned_to    TEXT,
  response       TEXT,
  created_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Change Orders
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS change_orders (
  id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  number          TEXT NOT NULL,
  project_id      UUID,
  project         TEXT,
  title           TEXT NOT NULL,
  description     TEXT,
  amount          NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  status          TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                    CHECK (status IN ('draft','pending','approved','rejected')),
  submitted_date  DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
  approved_date   DATE,
  reason          TEXT,
  schedule_impact INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Team Members
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS team_members (
  id               UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name             TEXT NOT NULL,
  role             TEXT,
  trade            TEXT,
  email            TEXT,
  phone            TEXT,
  status           TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'
                     CHECK (status IN ('active','on_site','off_site','leave','inactive')),
  cis_status       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'net'
                     CHECK (cis_status IN ('gross','net','unverified')),
  utr_number       TEXT,
  ni_number        TEXT,
  hours_this_week  NUMERIC(5,1) DEFAULT 0,
  rams_completed   BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  created_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Equipment / Plant
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS equipment (
  id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name         TEXT NOT NULL,
  type         TEXT,
  registration TEXT,
  status       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'available'
                 CHECK (status IN ('available','on_site','maintenance','hired_out')),
  location     TEXT,
  next_service DATE,
  daily_rate   NUMERIC(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  hire_period  TEXT,
  created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Subcontractors
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subcontractors (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  company           TEXT NOT NULL,
  trade             TEXT,
  contact           TEXT,
  email             TEXT,
  phone             TEXT,
  status            TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'
                      CHECK (status IN ('active','inactive','pending')),
  cis_verified      BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  insurance_expiry  DATE,
  rams_approved     BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  current_project   TEXT,
  contract_value    NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  rating            NUMERIC(2,1) DEFAULT 0,
  created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Documents
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS documents (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name          TEXT NOT NULL,
  type          TEXT,
  project_id    UUID,
  project       TEXT,
  uploaded_by   TEXT,
  version       TEXT DEFAULT '1.0',
  size          TEXT,
  status        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'current'
                  CHECK (status IN ('current','superseded','draft','for-review')),
  category      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'REPORTS'
                  CHECK (category IN ('PLANS','DRAWINGS','PERMITS','RAMS','CONTRACTS','REPORTS','SPECS','PHOTOS')),
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Timesheets
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS timesheets (
  id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  worker_id       UUID,
  worker          TEXT,
  project_id      UUID,
  project         TEXT,
  week            DATE,
  regular_hours   NUMERIC(5,1) DEFAULT 0,
  overtime_hours  NUMERIC(5,1) DEFAULT 0,
  daywork_hours   NUMERIC(5,1) DEFAULT 0,
  total_pay       NUMERIC(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  status          TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                    CHECK (status IN ('draft','submitted','approved','paid')),
  cis_deduction   NUMERIC(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Meetings
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meetings (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  title         TEXT NOT NULL,
  meeting_type  TEXT DEFAULT 'Site Progress',
  project_id    UUID,
  project       TEXT,
  date          DATE,
  time          TEXT,
  location      TEXT,
  attendees     TEXT,
  agenda        TEXT,
  minutes       TEXT,
  actions       TEXT,
  status        TEXT DEFAULT 'Scheduled',
  link          TEXT,
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Materials
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS materials (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name          TEXT NOT NULL,
  category      TEXT,
  quantity      NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  unit          TEXT DEFAULT 'nr',
  unit_cost     NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_cost    NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  supplier      TEXT,
  project_id    UUID,
  project       TEXT,
  status        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ordered'
                  CHECK (status IN ('ordered','delivered','on_site','used')),
  delivery_date DATE,
  po_number     TEXT,
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Punch List
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS punch_list (
  id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  project_id  UUID,
  project     TEXT,
  location    TEXT,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  assigned_to TEXT,
  priority    TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium'
                CHECK (priority IN ('low','medium','high','critical')),
  status      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open'
                CHECK (status IN ('open','in_progress','completed','rejected')),
  due_date    DATE,
  photos      INT DEFAULT 0,
  trade       TEXT,
  created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Inspections
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS inspections (
  id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  type            TEXT NOT NULL,
  project_id      UUID,
  project         TEXT,
  inspector       TEXT,
  date            DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
  status          TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled'
                    CHECK (status IN ('scheduled','passed','failed','conditional')),
  score           INT CHECK (score BETWEEN 0 AND 100),
  items           JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  next_inspection DATE,
  created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- RAMS
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rams (
  id               UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  title            TEXT NOT NULL,
  project_id       UUID,
  project          TEXT,
  activity         TEXT,
  version          TEXT DEFAULT '1.0',
  status           TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                     CHECK (status IN ('draft','review','approved','expired')),
  created_by       TEXT,
  approved_by      TEXT,
  review_date      DATE,
  hazards          JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  method_statement JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  ppe              JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  signatures       INT DEFAULT 0,
  required         INT DEFAULT 1,
  created_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- CIS Returns
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cis_returns (
  id                    UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  contractor            TEXT NOT NULL,
  utr                   TEXT,
  period                TEXT,
  gross_payment         NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  materials_cost        NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  labour_net            NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  cis_deduction         NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  status                TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'
                          CHECK (status IN ('pending','submitted','verified')),
  verification_status   TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'net'
                          CHECK (verification_status IN ('gross','net','unverified')),
  created_at            TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Tenders
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenders (
  id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  title        TEXT NOT NULL,
  client       TEXT,
  value        NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  deadline     DATE,
  status       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'drafting'
                 CHECK (status IN ('drafting','submitted','shortlisted','won','lost')),
  probability  INT DEFAULT 50 CHECK (probability BETWEEN 0 AND 100),
  type         TEXT,
  location     TEXT,
  ai_score     INT CHECK (ai_score BETWEEN 0 AND 100),
  notes        TEXT,
  created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Contacts (CRM)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contacts (
  id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name         TEXT NOT NULL,
  company      TEXT,
  role         TEXT,
  email        TEXT,
  phone        TEXT,
  type         TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'client'
                 CHECK (type IN ('client','prospect','supplier','subcontractor','consultant')),
  value        NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  last_contact DATE,
  status       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'
                 CHECK (status IN ('active','dormant','lost')),
  projects     INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Risk Register
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_register (
  id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  title        TEXT NOT NULL,
  project_id   UUID,
  project      TEXT,
  category     TEXT,
  likelihood   INT DEFAULT 3 CHECK (likelihood BETWEEN 1 AND 5),
  impact       INT DEFAULT 3 CHECK (impact BETWEEN 1 AND 5),
  risk_score   INT GENERATED ALWAYS AS (likelihood * impact) STORED,
  owner        TEXT,
  status       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open'
                 CHECK (status IN ('open','mitigated','closed','monitoring')),
  mitigation   TEXT,
  review_date  DATE,
  created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Purchase Orders
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS purchase_orders (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  number        TEXT NOT NULL,
  supplier      TEXT,
  project_id    UUID,
  project       TEXT,
  amount        NUMERIC(14,2) DEFAULT 0,
  status        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft'
                  CHECK (status IN ('draft','sent','confirmed','delivered','cancelled')),
  order_date    DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
  delivery_date DATE,
  items         JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  notes         TEXT,
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Daily Reports
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS daily_reports (
  id               UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  project_id       UUID,
  project          TEXT,
  date             DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
  prepared_by      TEXT,
  weather          TEXT DEFAULT 'Sunny',
  temperature      TEXT,
  workers_on_site  INT DEFAULT 0,
  activities       JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  materials        JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  equipment        JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  issues           JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  photos           INT DEFAULT 0,
  progress         INT DEFAULT 0 CHECK (progress BETWEEN 0 AND 100),
  created_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

content.text:
<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Initial request: "continue building our functionality" - requested to continue development of the CortexBuild Ultimate platform with new functionality enhancements
   - User requested building four major features: "all of them" - AI Insights Engine, Real-time Notifications, Executive Reporting, and Predictive Analytics
   - All features should be production-grade and integrate with the existing dark theme industrial command center aesthetic
   - Features should analyze project data, safety trends, financial metrics with actionable recommendations

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - WebSocket real-time communication (ws library)
   - JWT authentication for WebSocket connections
   - React Query for data caching and background refresh
   - Recharts for data visualization (LineChart, AreaChart, BarChart, PieChart)
   - Lucide React icons
   - TypeScript with React functional components
   - Custom CSS variable design token system (--slate-*, --amber-*, --purple-*)
   - Earned Value Management (EVM) principles for delay prediction
   - Schedule variance and cost performance index calculations
   - Time-series analysis for safety incident forecasting
   - Cash flow forecasting based on invoice aging
   - Risk scoring algorithms with confidence levels

3. Files and Code Sections:

   **src/components/modules/Insights.tsx** (NEW - 500+ lines)
   - Purpose: AI-powered intelligence engine analyzing project health, safety trends, and financial metrics
   - Key implementations:
     - generateInsights() function producing insights across 6 categories (financial, safety, programme, resource, quality, risk)
     - SEVERITY configuration (critical, high, medium, low, info) with color coding
     - RecommendationCard component with actionable recommendations
     - Insight filtering by severity and category
     - Trend data visualization with stacked bar charts
     - Confidence distribution pie chart
   - Algorithm highlights:
     - Budget variance calculation: ((totalSpent - totalBudget) / totalBudget) * 100
     - Cash flow ratio: overdueInvoices / paidInvoices
     - Safety score: 100 - openIncidents×8 - criticalIncidents×15
     - Schedule slippage detection: progress < expectedProgress - 15%
     - RAMS compliance tracking
     - CIS verification monitoring

   **server/lib/websocket.js** (NEW - 250+ lines)
   - Purpose: WebSocket server for real-time notifications and live dashboard updates
   - Key implementations:
     - initWebSocket(server) - attaches to HTTP server on /ws path
     - JWT token authentication for WebSocket connections
     - Message types: NOTIFICATION, DASHBOARD_UPDATE, ALERT, COLLABORATION, SYSTEM
     - Client store: Map<userId, Set<WebSocket>>
     - Room system: Map<roomId, Set<userId>>
     - Helper functions: createNotification, createAlert, sendDashboardUpdate, notifyProjectTeam
   - Connection flow:
     - Token extraction from URL query string
     - JWT verification using jsonwebtoken library
     - Auto-join user's personal room (user:{userId})

   **server/index.js** (MODIFIED)
   - Changes:
     - Added http module import for WebSocket server creation
     - Changed from app.listen() to server.listen() to support WebSocket attachment
     - Added WebSocket initialization: initWebSocket(server)
     - Updated startup log to show WebSocket endpoint: ws://localhost:PORT/ws

   **src/hooks/useNotifications.ts** (NEW)
   - Purpose: React hook for WebSocket notifications
